t2i-kamui-fal-openai-gpt-image-2.description: OpenAI GPT Image 2 Text-to-Image (fal openai/gpt-image-2) - Next-gen image model (alpha), flexible resolution up to ~4K. prompt (required); image_size presets square_hd, square, portrait_4_3, portrait_16_9, landscape_4_3, landscape_16_9 (default landscape_4_3) or image_width+image_height; quality low, medium, high (default high); num_images (default 1); output_format jpeg, png, webp (default png); sync_mode; optional openai_api_key (BYOK). Returns Fal queue JSON via Kamui Code ⭐⭐⭐

i2i-kamui-fal-openai-gpt-image-2-edit.description: OpenAI GPT Image 2 Image-to-Image / Edit (fal openai/gpt-image-2/edit) - Alpha edit API. prompt (required); image_urls (required, list of image URLs or data URIs); image_size presets square_hd, square, portrait_4_3, portrait_16_9, landscape_4_3, landscape_16_9, auto (default auto) or image_width+image_height; quality low, medium, high (default high); num_images (default 1); output_format jpeg, png, webp (default png); sync_mode; optional mask_url; optional openai_api_key (BYOK). Returns Fal queue JSON via Kamui Code ⭐⭐⭐

r2v-kamui-bytedance-seedance-v20-referen.description: ByteDance Seedance 2.0 Reference-to-Video - Fal model bytedance/seedance-2.0/reference-to-video. prompt (required); image_urls (up to 9), video_urls (up to 3), audio_urls (up to 3, requires image or video); resolution 480p/720p; duration auto or 4-15; aspect_ratio; generate_audio; seed; end_user_id. Returns Fal JSON via Kamui Code ⭐⭐⭐⭐
